title: Greece turns to space technology: AI-powered satellites begin tracking wildfires
summary_full: Greece is pioneering a new defense against wildfires with a constellation of four compact satellites. These space-based eyes, equipped with thermal sensors, detect nascent blazes as small as four meters, providing crucial early warnings. Integrated with AI, the system prioritizes threats, enabling faster response and potentially saving lives and property amidst escalating fire seasons.
